title: 40L 40 Litre Large Robust Flexi Tubs - Set of 3 - Mixed Assorted Colours Randomly Picked - Multi Purpose Flexible Rubber Storage Container Buckets
features: You'll wonder how you ever coped without the Tuff Spot range of Multi-Purpose 40L Flexi Tubs available in 3PC, 5PC & 10PC sets.

These handy yet durable tubs are suitable for a wide range of home, garden, school, office or industrial uses such as storage containers, toy tubs, laundry baskets, garden waste, washing cars or mixing plaster.
They are manufactured from heavy duty polyethylene materials and boast a flexible shatter-proof construction adding to its versatility and multipurpose credentials.

This is a large flexi tub with a 40Litre capacity and a stackable design for easy storage. Features strong integrated carry handles suitable for carrying heavy loads. Dimensions: 38cm (H) x 48.5cm (W) x 45cm (D)
The colour will be randomly picked and despatched. Sadly we can make no guarantee on what colour(s) you will receive but every effort will be made to reduce duplications.
